case_title: JEFFREY S. BITTON VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTON, JEFFREY S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM NOT FILED TIMELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
